summary: Test suite covers only basic happy-path scenarios (feat→minor, fix→patch, breaking→major) but lacks comprehensive edge case and error handling coverage. Critical gaps: (1) no error scenarios tested (missing VERSION file, invalid semver, malformed commits); (2) package.json support untested despite being a primary requirement; (3) fixture files referenced but not defined (code references $REPO_ROOT/fixtures/*/VERSION but these aren't created); (4) assertions rely on grep matching act log output rather than verifying actual artifacts (VERSION file, CHANGELOG.md content); (5) no cleanup of temporary repos created during tests; (6) no verification of mixed commit scenarios (feat+breaking should bump major); (7) changelog structure verified only by checking section headers exist, not actual content correctness; (8) no test for git log fallback when COMMITS_FILE absent. Design has reasonable structure with helper functions but is brittle—relies entirely on act output parsing without validating on-disk state changes. Would miss regressions in error paths, edge cases, file modifications, and package.json handling.
